{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lillie

|img=Lillie Stoutland.png

|epnum=SM032
|epname=Treasure Hunt, Akala Style!
|vajp=
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc=Lillie was given a [[Poké Ride]] {{p|Stoutland}} to hunt for treasure around [[Akala Island]]. Due to her fear of touching Pokémon, she initially struggled to get on Stoutland. Eventually, with support from {{an|Professor Kukui}} and [[Olivia]], she was able to get on Stoutland but was unable to hunt for treasure with it.

None of Stoutland's moves are known.}}
